title: Proclamation No. 534, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 534

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF AMDUNTOG, MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF KIANGAN, SUBPROVINCE OF IFUGAO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Amduntog, municipal district of Kiangan, subprovince of Ifugao, Mountain Province, island of Luzon and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psu-101381, to wit:

A parcel of land (Plan Psu-101381, G. L. R. O. No.    ) situated in the Barrio of Amduntog, municipal district of Kiangan, subprovince of Igugao, Mountain Province. Bounded on the north by the property of Carmen Manayao and public land; on the east, by the properties of Antonio Hagada and Dulnuan Guyguyon; on the southeast, by property of Tugnaon Dulnuan; on the southwest, by the property of Carmen Manayao and on the west, by the property of Rolan Cabbigat. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 17° 34′ W., 5074.33 meters, more or less, from B.L.L.M. No. 2, Mp. of Kiangan, Ifugao, Mountain Province, thence S. 79′ 42′ E., 40.07 m. to point “2”; thence S. 5′ 30′ W., 16.72 m. to point “3”; thence S. 17° 02′ W 14 07 m. to point “4”; thence S. 52° 19’ W., 112.51 m. to point “5”; thence N. 55° 53’ W., 45.63 m. to point “6”; thence N. 17° 02’ E., 70.76 m. to point “7”; thence N. 74° 06′ E., 31.74 m. to point “8” E., 42.07 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of eight thousand six hundred two square meters (8,602) more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground points 1 to 7, inclusive, are marked by P.L.S. concrete monuments 15 cm. in diameter and 60 cm. long; and point 8 by big boulder on rock of fixed position; bearings true; declination 1° 00′ E.; date of survey, October 1-5, 1935 and July 15-24 and Sept. 4, 1938, and that of the approval October 14, 1939.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this first day of April, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

(Sgd.) MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
